caption: This news broadcast depicts a group of men gathered in what appears to be an official setting, featuring a backdrop with Hindi text and dates. A man in a brown shawl and cap is centrally positioned, speaking and gesturing with his hand. To his right, a man in a dark vest over a light-colored shirt listens intently. The screen is heavily layered with graphics, including the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo in the top right and a red ticker at the bottom stating, "जे. पी. नड्डा: I.N.D.I. गठबंधन चलने वाला नहीं है". A top headline asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". Sidebars list names such as "बिजेन्द्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार". As the sequence progresses, a small inset video appears on the left, showing a different man speaking, while the main shot remains focused on the group, showing slight shifts in their expressions and gestures.
